issues.description: Condition should be 'HasAttachedDon' with count:8, not 'HasRestingDon' with count:1. Card requires 8+ DON!! attached to field, not 1 resting DON!!
Count should be 8 (matching '8 or more'), not 1
Trigger should be 'OnPlay' or 'Trigger', not 'Activated'. This is a passive static effect that checks when card enters field, not an activated ability
Duration should be 'Permanent', not 'EndOfTurn'. The effect persists as long as condition is met, not just until end of turn
